prompt: Hand category: bottom pair. Board fit: the hand caught the board lightly, but many higher pairs and stronger made hands are possible. Classify the range bucket.
why_v1: Weak means the hand touched the board, but its fit is low and many stronger made hands can exist.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This is weak because bottom pair has some board fit, but many higher pairs and stronger made hands can beat it.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This is weak because the hand is not a full miss, yet its board fit is low and easily outclassed.
